creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
From comment 13: 

> assume that: … "Dump Status: good" is not trustworthy. 

Sorry, ignore that. 

Re: the manual page, 

> … checks the core dump in various ways to make sure that it is complete. 
> If it passes these checks, it saves the core image in directory/vmcore.# and 
> information about the core in directory/info.#. …

– now I believe that the goodness reported in info.13 was trustworthy 
  information about the _dump_, which certainly no longer exists in this case; 
  not about the image of the core, which is probably useless in this case.
